# Nomtiq 小饭票

> Nomtiq is an open-source personalized restaurant finder skill for AI agents. It supports nearby dining, date night, business meals, family gatherings, solo dining, and local restaurant taste memory.

Canonical repository: https://github.com/OakcoderX/nomtiq
Agent Skill instructions: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OakcoderX/nomtiq/main/SKILL.md
ClawHub: https://clawhub.ai/oakcoderx/skills/nomtiq
License: MIT-0

Install for Agent Skills-compatible clients:
npx skills add OakcoderX/nomtiq --skill nomtiq -g

Install from ClawHub:
npx clawhub@latest install @oakcoderx/nomtiq

Use for:
- Where should we eat tonight?
- Nearby restaurant recommendations
- Date-night, business, family, group, anniversary, or solo dining
- 找餐厅、推荐餐厅、今晚吃什么、附近有什么好吃的
- Recording a restaurant visit and updating a local taste profile

Do not use for recipes, groceries, calorie tracking, food delivery, restaurant marketing, reservations, order placement, or automated review publishing.
